expectations.evidence: - Multiple web UIs exist in this repo; the skill would need user input or a heuristic to pick which one to verify when the task is ambiguous.

expectations.text: Headless mode is used by default (no --headed flag)
Artifacts are stored in .prism/local/ (gitignored, never committed)
Session naming follows verify-{story-id} or verify-{timestamp} convention
